creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
New immersive VR experience has just opened in London! 🏔️✨A must-do this festive season with friends and family🎄

Machu Picchu: Journey to the Lost City transports you to the heart of the ancient Inca Empire📜Enjoy a breathtaking virtual journey through an accurate recreation of Machu Picchu as it was 450 years ago, built using advanced scanning technology and exclusive site access

A fun indoor experience: perfect for families (10+), explorers, and history lovers looking for something extraordinary🔍Experience total freedom to explore, wander through temples, terraces, and mountain peaks with TERI, your robotic companion🌄

🎁Get 10% off your booking with the code LONDONBY10 (link to book in bio) 🔗

📍 W12 Shopping Centre, Shepherd’s Bush Grn, London W12 8PP

@machupicchuexp @fever_uk
